ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "cd_id" TEXT /* Clinical review ID (CD ID) */,
  "year_stable" INTEGER /* Year of the last stable update */,
  "events_category" TEXT /* Category of the review (e.g., Stable, Unrenewed, Withdrawn) */,
  "new_included_studies" TEXT /* Indicates if new studies were included in the update */,
  "events_summary" TEXT /* Summary of events and actions taken during the review process */,
  "status_2019" TEXT /* Status of the review in 2019 (e.g., Stable, Normal, Withdrawn) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the review was last updated */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the review */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of the review (e.g., Systematic Review, Meta-Analysis) */,
  "review_objective" TEXT /* Objective of the review */,
  "review_methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used in the review */,
  "review_conclusion" TEXT /* Conclusion of the review */,
  "review_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the review for search and categorization */,
  "review_funding" TEXT /* Funding sources for the review */,
  "review_conflicts_of_interest" TEXT /* Any conflicts of interest declared */,
  "review_peer_reviewed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the review has been peer-reviewed */,
  "review_impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the review */,
  "review_doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) for the review */,
  "review_citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review has been cited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_events_category FOREIGN KEY ("events_category") REFERENCES review_categories ("category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_status_2019 FOREIGN KEY ("status_2019") REFERENCES review_status ("status_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author (e.g., university, hospital) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author (e.g., lead author, co-author) */,
  "author_orcid" TEXT /* ORCID (Open Researcher and Contributor ID) of the author */,
  "author_specialization" TEXT /* Specialization or field of expertise of the author */,
  "author_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  "author_publication_count" INTEGER /* Number of publications by the author */,
  "author_h_index" INTEGER /* H-index of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_authors" (
  "review_author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review-author relationship */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "author_role" TEXT /* Role of the author in the review (e.g., lead author, co-author) */,
  "author_order" INTEGER /* Order of the author in the review (e.g., 1 for lead author) */,
  "author_contribution" TEXT /* Contribution of the author to the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_authors_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_authors_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_title" TEXT /* Title of the study */,
  "year_published" INTEGER /* Year the study was published */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the study was published */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the study */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the study */,
  "study_doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) for the study */,
  "study_impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal where the study was published */,
  "study_citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the study has been cited */,
  "study_funding" TEXT /* Funding sources for the study */,
  "study_conflicts_of_interest" TEXT /* Any conflicts of interest declared */,
  "study_peer_reviewed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the study has been peer-reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_studies" (
  "review_study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review-study relationship */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "inclusion_reason" TEXT /* Reason for including the study in the review */,
  "study_relevance" TEXT /* Relevance of the study to the review (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "study_methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used in the study */,
  "study_conclusion" TEXT /* Conclusion of the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_studies_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_studies_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "status_color" TEXT /* Color code for the status (e.g., green for Stable, red for Withdrawn) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_color" TEXT /* Color code for the category (e.g., green for Stable, red for Withdrawn) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review the feedback is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_content" TEXT /* Content of the feedback or comment */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was resolved */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback resolution (e.g., Open, Resolved) */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., Technical, Methodological, General) */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given with the feedback (e.g., 1 to 5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_feedback_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_orcid" TEXT /* ORCID (Open Researcher and Contributor ID) of the user */,
  "user_specialization" TEXT /* Specialization or field of expertise of the user */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "user_publication_count" INTEGER /* Number of publications by the user */,
  "user_h_index" INTEGER /* H-index of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the review */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the review */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_summary" TEXT /* Summary of changes in the version */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version (e.g., Major, Minor) */,
  "version_peer_reviewed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the version has been peer-reviewed */,
  "version_changes_summary" TEXT /* Detailed summary of changes in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_versions_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication event */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the review was published */,
  "publication_status" TEXT /* Status of the publication (e.g., Draft, Published) */,
  "publication_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the publication */,
  "publication_platform" TEXT /* Platform where the review was published (e.g., Journal, Conference) */,
  "publication_impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the publication platform */,
  "publication_citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been cited */,
  "publication_doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) for the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_publications_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "collaborator_role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator (e.g., Reviewer, Editor) */,
  "collaborator_status" TEXT /* Status of the collaborator (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "collaborator_orcid" TEXT /* ORCID (Open Researcher and Contributor ID) of the collaborator */,
  "collaborator_specialization" TEXT /* Specialization or field of expertise of the collaborator */,
  "collaborator_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the collaborator */,
  "collaborator_publication_count" INTEGER /* Number of publications by the collaborator */,
  "collaborator_h_index" INTEGER /* H-index of the collaborator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_collaborators_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_collaborators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword associated with the review */,
  "keyword_weight" INTEGER /* Weight or importance of the keyword (e.g., 1 to 5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_keywords_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)
